title: Detailed Animations
body:
<iframe width="112" height="63" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/TTkGCOzoBEo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Detailed Animations is a Work In Progress player animation resource pack aiming to improve Minecraft's third person player animations.**

# **Dependencies:**

[![Entity Model Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d79bad19d862aa4923ef3b6c1876c9f867a517fc_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) [![Entity Texture Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3a58dba3f4eb9b8f8b7b6ce75975ab547427656.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)


<details>
<summary>Animations:</summary>
  
- Walking Animation
- Hoprun Animation
- Climbing Animation
- Horizontal Flying Animation
- Jump Animation
- Landing Animation
- In Water Walking Animation 
- Idle Animation
- In Rain Animation
- Burning Animation
- Cape Physics
- Elytra Physics

</details>

<details>
<summary>Incompatibilities:</summary>

- Optifine
- Fresh Moves (Resource Pack)
- Just Expressions (Resource Pack)
- Better Animations (Resource Pack)
- Serious Player Animations (mod)
- Improved Animations / Trainguy's Animation Overhaul (mod)
- Paper Doll (mod)
- Minecraft Comes Alive Reborn (mod)

</details>

<details>
<summary>"Not Enough Animations" Settings:</summary>

These settings are in the mod "Not Enough Animations". This resource pack doesn't feature settings.

- Animation Smoothing = **OFF**
- Disable Leg Smoothing = **ON**
- Ladder Animation = **OFF**
- Holding Up Items = **No Items**

</details>

**Keep in mind that most other animations also have bugs and artifacts when it comes to compatibility with this resource pack.**

**If you need help you can join the [discord server](https://discord.gg/ACvpCvZja4).**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/c0WVGh_nh_w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
